holdings.infoBox: ORCS is an equity ETF with a total of 10 individual holdings. The top holdings are Dreyfus Govt Cash Man Ins stock at 68.22%, Barclays Collateral at 14.93%, Goldman Finl Sq Trsry Inst 506 at 11.39%, Dreyfus Trsry Securities Cash Mgmt at 7.79%, and Oracle Corp Swap at 3.27%.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily ORCL Bear 1X ETF (ORCS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund provides inverse (-1x) exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Oracle Corporation (NYSE: ORCL). ORCS was launched on Nov 19, 2025 and is issued by Direxion.
